zh.Gask, Perthshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭培爾分度 加斯可
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Murray Ist of Tullibardine於大約1255年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾分度 加斯可時，他的父親Malcolm Murray Sheriff of Perth36歲，母親Mary Freskin32歲。他和Ada Strathearn至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1297年5月24日之後在蘇格蘭培爾圖利巴迪，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Murray Ist of Tullibardine于大约1255年出生在英国苏格兰培爾分度 加斯可时，他的父亲Malcolm Murray Sheriff of Perth36岁，母亲Mary Freskin32岁。他和Ada Strathearn至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1297年5月24日之后在苏格兰培爾圖利巴迪，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Murray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moray in northeastern Scotland, which derives from Celtic mori- ‘sea’ + treb- ‘settlement’. The founder of the Scottish house of Murray was a Fleming named Freskin who was granted Strathbrock in West Lothian and Duffus in Moray by David I. The family took its name from the region in the late 12th century.
Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McMurray  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireadhaigh ‘descendant of Muireadhach’ a personal name meaning ‘mariner’. Occasionally it may be a shortened form of McMurray .

variants.name: Murry
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murrah
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Murray  .

variants.name: Murie
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Murie in Errol (Perthshire).
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Merhi
meanings: Arabic (mainly Lebanon and Syria): from a variant of the personal name Mirhi of unknown meaning. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Murray 5.

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murra
meanings: Italian (Sicily): topographic name from Sicilian murra ‘large rock, mass of rocks’ or a habitational name from a place called with this word.
Albanian: nickname from murrë (definite form murra) ‘dark gray cow’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Murray Ist of Tullibardine was born about 1255, in Findo Gask, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcolm Murray Sheriff of Perth, was 36 and his mother, Mary Freskin, was 32. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Ada Strathearn. He died after 24 May 1297, in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Murray Ist of Tullibardine est né environ 1255, à Findo Gask, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm Murray Sheriff of Perth, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mary Freskin, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Ada Strathearn. Il est décédé après 24 mai 1297, à Tullibardine, Perthshire, Écosse, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Gask, Perthshire, Scotland: Findo Gask, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Murray Ist of Tullibardine um 1255 in Findo Gask, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm Murray Sheriff of Perth 36 und seine Mutter Mary Freskin 32. Er hatte mit Ada Strathearn mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 24. Mai 1297 in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Ada Strathearn. Morì dopo il 24 maggio 1297, nel Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Murray Ist of Tullibardineが約1255年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアフィンド ガスクで生まれた時，父Malcolm Murray Sheriff of Perthは36歳，母Mary Freskinは32歳であった。彼はAda Strathearnとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1297年5月24日以後にスコットランドペルスシュアイアトゥリバーディンで死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Murray Ist of Tullibardine(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 핑도 가스크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm Murray Sheriff of Perth(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Freskin(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Ada Strathearn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 5월 24일 이후 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 툴리바딘에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Murray Ist of Tullibardine родился около 1255 г. в местности финдо гаск, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcolm Murray Sheriff of Perth было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Freskin, 32. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Ada Strathearn. Он умер после 24 май 1297 г. в местности туллибардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.
